name: Usersnap
description: Visual feedback, bug reporting, NPS/CSAT microsurveys and session replay for product teams to collect in-app feedback.

seo.title: Usersnap — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: Usersnap: Visual feedback, bug reporting, NPS/CSAT microsurveys and session replay for product teams to collect in-app feedback.

when_to_use: In-app visual bug reporting with screenshot annotation
NPS and CSAT microsurveys triggered at key user moments
Session replay correlated with submitted user feedback
Product feedback collection embedded in web applications

pros: In-app feedback widgets collect bugs with screenshots
NPS and CSAT microsurveys share one SDK
Session replay adds context to reported issues
Good Jira and Zendesk integrations for dev workflows
cons: Primarily feedback tool, replay is secondary depth
Widget can feel intrusive on polished B2C UIs
Pricing per project gets pricey across portfolios
Survey logic is simpler than specialist survey tools
review.verdict: Strong in-app feedback and bug capture tool, with replay as supporting evidence rather than a standalone strength.
review.best_for: B2B product teams collecting feedback, bugs and NPS inside the app.
review.not_for: Marketing teams wanting a Hotjar-style heatmap and CRO suite.
